source_pr.title: executor: fix unstable test of TestIntegrationCopCache
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #20547

### What is changed and how it works?

What's Changed: Do not directly compare the string, compare the hit ratio and 0 instead.

### Related changes

- Need to cherry-pick to the release branch

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- Unit test
- Integration test

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

- fix unstable test of TestIntegrationCopCache

evidence: evidence: PR title: executor: fix unstable test of TestIntegrationCopCache
evidence: relax exact `copr_cache_hit_ratio: 0.67` assert; parse ratio and assert `> 0` to avoid nondeterministic ratio flake (executor/executor_test.go)
